/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libZlibCompressPlugin.so -o ../libZlibCompressPlugin.so CMakeFiles/ZlibCompressPlugin.dir/ZlibCompressPlugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZlibCompressPlugin.dir/ZlibCompressPlugin.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
